node.text:
Save your new brain chemicals guide ➡️🧠

What’s your favourite brain chemical when you read this list?

If you’re interested in reading The DOSE Effect so you can complete daily challenges to boost your brain chemistry then comment ‘book’ below.

Thanks for all your support recently guys.

I can’t thank you enough for the thousands of messages you’re sending about how this book is changing your lives.

You guys are incredible.

❤️ @tjpower

node.text: In Pakistan (2024): Hico ice cream sued walls for misleading consumers, The Competition Commission of Pakistan (CCP) fined the manufacturer of Wall's (Unilever) Rs 75 million for misleading consumers by advertising frozen desserts as "ice cream". An additional Rs 20 million fine was imposed for running ads that falsely portrayed these oil-based products as healthier than dairy ice cream.
BHAI WO DOOR PE WALLS WALE BULA RHE HAIN 🤫
Bhosdyat ja bhai 🙂 khaun zalya vr sangtos tu 💔
Sabse acha h Matka kulfi lo 😁😘
Keep educate me. Love you brother ❤️

node.text:
The surface web barely scratches the surface. 🧊

💻 To uncover the real threats, dive deeper with these 5 dark web hotspots. Dread's where underground conversations ignite, Exploit.in's where the next big cyber-attacks take shape.

OSINT pros rely on these sites to stay ahead. Visibility is key: see the threat, stop it.

#DarkWebOSINT #CyberIntel #DigitalThreats #HackerForums #TechTrends2026 CyberSecurity

node.text: #🇪🇸Spain is turning city borders into a living lung! Through the "Metropolitan Forest" project, Madrid is planting 1.3 million trees to create a 75km green belt. This smart ecosystem doesn't just provide shade; it fights climate change by absorbing 175,000 tons of \bm{CO_2} annually and lowering urban temperatures. A brilliant way to blend nature with urban life-turning a bustling capital into a🌍🌳 .sustainable sanctuary #kasmvvc

node.text:
These are the terms that show up again and again:
in internships, technical screens, and real jobs.

I put together a detailed guide + roadmap on exactly what to learn (and in what order).

Comment “CS” and I’ll send it to you!

node.text:
New fear unlocked: Roundworms. 🔓🪱

This is your sign to stop eating at places that don’t have a Food Handler Certification. Your gut will thank you later! 🤢👉

#pakistan #india #usa #iran #food
Sahi kaha Kisi ne. Keera srif daant m hi nhi HOTA..
Q darahi ho yaar Abi food panda se order kara tha khana 🥲🥲
Meri dost k andar to 2 mu waly kera he 😂
May jab chota tha mujhay dr nay dawai dee meri tati kay sath nikla tha
Sahi kaha Kisi ne. Keera srif daant m hi nhi HOTA..

owner.full_name: Viral | News | Breaking | India | Telugu | Tamil | Global

node.text:
A heart-melting moment is winning the internet after a stray cat couple quietly walked into a restaurant looking for food. The two cats stayed close together, patiently waiting and hoping someone would notice them.

What touched viewers the most was how they moved as a pair, almost like they were looking out for each other while searching for a meal. Moments like this remind people how animals form bonds and depend on kindness from humans.

Clips like these are melting hearts online, showing that sometimes a little compassion can make a big difference for animals living on the streets.

🎥 Twitter

#StrayCats #AnimalLovers #WholesomeMoment #KindnessMatters #ViralVideo 🥺🐱

node.text: Preternatural insight. Reality vs Hollywood. Is the idea of a 'modern ninja' ridiculous or can we learn something from the old? Is a cyber guy just behind a monitor, is the intel guy jumping off rooftops? Do they wear hoodies or suits? How can we best interpret highly independent multidisciplinary focus.
From old Soviet film I watched as a kid, that was like the whole training thing for the kgb.
I still look cool in all black with my monitors lol

either way all good of course. - i assume you studying something involving  the computers & technologies ?  i only have outdated education with cisco networking classes.  i did the CCNA certification.  for the tier i was at
I still look cool in all black with my monitors lol

node.text: 🇯🇵1,300 km/h. On land. Not a plane. A train.🚄💨 Blink... and the city is gone. This simulation imagines Japan pushing rail technology beyond anything we know - past 320 km/h Shinkansen speeds... beyond 600 km/h maglev tests... into true Mach-level travel.🚀 At this speed, air becomes the enemy. Even the smallest vibration turns into a massive force. To make it possible, engineers explore: ⚡ Magnetic levitation⚡ Near-zero friction systems ⚡Low-pressure or vacuum tubes ⚡Al precision control measured in millimeters If achieved, hours would turn into minutes. Distance would lose meaning. Cities would feel closer than ever before. This isn’t just transportation. It’s the future of movement. Would you step inside a supersonic train? 👀🔥 #Japan #Supersonic #FutureTech #Maglev #Innovation HighSpeedRail
@goklesh._shrma._ google kr lena raid k bare m

postRawData.accessibility_caption: Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of studying and text that says 'QUOTES FROM THE BEST SCHOLARS'.

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of studying and text that says 'QUOTES FROM THE BEST SCHOLARS'.

Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of head covering and text that says 'What is meant for you will reach you, even if ifitis it is beneath two mountains. And what is not meant for you will not reach you, even if it be between your two lips. -mam Al-Ghazali'.

Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of turban and text that says 'How strange is man. He ruins his present while worrying about his his future, but weeps in the future by recalling his past. -Imam Ali'.

Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'When someone Whensomeoneissoftwith is soft with the world, it doesn't mean they haven't they seen harshness. It means they choose not to repeat it. -Saadi Shirazi'.
Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be a doodle of text that says 'Before you speak, let your words pass through three gates: Is it true? Is it necessary? Is it kind? -RUMI'.

Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of standing and text that says 'Do not be fooled by your prayers and fasting. Look at how you treat others. That's the real reflection of your soul. -Imam Al-Ghazali'.

Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'of us are selective sinners. We choose the sins we are comfortable with and judge others that commit the ones we re not comfortable with. -Shams Tabrizi'.

Photo by RUMI Wisdom on January 12, 2026. May be a doodle of poster and text that says 'Value each other, Valueeachother,because because one day you will part suddenly and without warning. -rTaT Ali'.

node.text: My goodness these quotes are full of  wisdom and guidance.  But humans make life so complicated....
Imam Ali is all heir teacher ❤️
Dont include Imam ameer al momineen Ali in a random list of regulars.
😢❤️ Beautiful, many sayings are from Imam Ali and not Rumi 😏

node.text: If Quaid-e-Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah saw Pakistan today, he would probably feel deep sorrow seeing innocent lives lost in a terrorist attack while, at the same time, people in another city celebrate without pausing to remember the victims. He built this country on unity, discipline, and respect for one another. Celebration is not wrong, but forgetting the pain of fellow Pakistanis would surely disappoint him. He would remind us that we are one nation, and when one part of the country is grieving, the rest should at least take a moment to show empathy and stand in solidarity with the families of the martyrs.
Quaid hotay to Unho ne Waise hi Mr jaana tha in logon ko dekh kr.. Pakistan ko jis base pr bnaya tha wo pura hi nhi kiya
He'd say how did my people find such courage to find happiness in such a difficult time of our history
@the.sceptic.human he let you separate from po-op eater please respect him don't fall for propaganda against him .

node.text:
The Epstein files refer to millions of pages of documents, images, and videos from federal investigations into Jeffrey Epstein’s sex trafficking activities, with major releases occurring in 2024, 2025, and as recently as January 2026.
Publicly unsealed portions name various high-profile individuals, often in passing or without accusations of wrongdoing.
Former presidents Bill Clinton and Donald Trump appear multiple times, including in flight logs and contacts; recent 2026 releases include hundreds of Trump mentions and unverified hearsay, but no proven abuse.
Prince Andrew features prominently, with emails about Buckingham Palace dinners and photos raising questions about his Epstein ties.
Others like Alan Dershowitz, Bill Richardson, Michael Jackson, Stephen Hawking, Noam Chomsky, and Bill Gates are cited in documents or photos, mostly as contacts.[wikipedia]
Recent 2026 Release
On January 30, 2026, the DOJ published over 3 million pages (3.5 million responsive docs total), including videos, emails, and an org chart of Epstein’s circle with some redactions for victims and unverified claims.
No new prosecutions stemmed directly from it, as officials noted files lack definitive proof of additional abusers despite public pressure.
Files include Epstein’s “black book” of contacts (celebrities, staff), flight logs, and claims of a suppressed client list-though much remains redacted for privacy or legal reasons. [wikipedia] Conspiracy theories persist about hidden names,
I m the only girl here
Seven minutes is all I can spare. 😂😂😂
Those who can do both and more 🗿

node.text:
Robert Greene (born May 14, 1959, in Los Angeles, California) is a world-renowned American author and strategist best known for his deep explorations of power, strategy, and human behavior. His seminal works, including The 48 Laws of Power and Mastery, have become essential manuals for leaders, entrepreneurs, and anyone seeking to navigate the complex dynamics of life and success.

His philosophy on mental performance is a radical departure from modern comfort: growth requires friction. He believes that the human brain thrives under high stakes and that the true enemy of potential isn’t stress, but boredom. To stay alert and purposeful, one must embrace the tension of necessity rather than seeking the safety of stagnation.

—

Your brain
Needs
Pressure.

It needs
Constant
Pressure.

Stress
And pressure
Is not
A bad thing.

Being
Bored
Will kill you.

That
Pressure
Makes you
Alert.

It makes
You want
To live.

You’ve got
To get
Things done.

—

Speaker: Robert Greene (@robertgreene)

Follow @peak.4mindset for daily motivation!

#selfbelief #success #dreambig #focus #pressure

node.text: Politics is not something fun to do its science its our life in their hands we should know everything if we don't or didn't care they will burn the earth we need to talk and observe
The more you delve into politics, the more unbearable it becomes...

Do you even love Bugatti? If not, congratulations you’re officially a child. Meanwhile, I’ll be over here worshipping the BMW M47 like it’s a religion. 🐻✋
Also, funny how a deeply religious person “shouldn’t” be a politician, but politicians can totally be religious behind the scenes when it benefits their own agenda. What a beautiful system.
No wonder India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are such masterpieces of development, because clearly mixing religion with politics has worked so well, right? Meanwhile, a country like China, which isn’t driven by religion in politics, somehow ends up being more developed. Shocking.
Here, we don’t even have proper education or healthcare in many places, but hey we’ve got an unlimited supply of superiority complexes powered by religion and ancient “glory” that doesn’t exactly pay today’s bills.
At this point, we’re basically like obedient little donkeys, blindly worshipping political parties like they’re gods.
Anyway, forget all that just make me the next Prime Minister of India. 🐻✋
A Muslim should not concern themself with what they have no business in, on that we do not follow the laws and politics of the kufar,
Better not if you dont really understand how politics work .. if you think its news or scandals you are far far away from understanding politics so stay where you are instead
The more you delve into politics, the more unbearable it becomes...
Politics is not something fun to do its science its our life in their hands we should know everything if we don't or didn't care they will burn the earth we need to talk and observe

node.text:
🚨Trump isn’t the only one breaking laws.

Appearing before the House Judiciary Committee Wednesday, Attorney General Pam Bondi stonewalled and personally attacked lawmakers asking oversight questions about the DOJ’s handling of the Epstein files release.

Bondi refused to apologize to victims of Epstein’s abuse after the DOJ failed to fully redact personal information and explicit images of victims in the over 3.5 million documents it released.

When questioning Bondi on the Epstein file contents, @reptedlieu accused Bondi of lying under oath — a violation of federal law.
They’re still around because accountability is optional when power is involved… and apparently, watching is easier than acting. Wake up America!
Why is she allowed to be so disrespectful? Isn't this an official event?
In another video of her being questioned, she abuses her power by mentioning her position in the hearing. Such people are only wasting oxygen
Imagine if some masked people did something to her one day
So sick of these hearings, nothin is ever done.
Why is she allowed to be so disrespectful? Isn't this an official event?
They’re still around because accountability is optional when power is involved… and apparently, watching is easier than acting. Wake up America!

node.text:
🇯🇵जब रफ्तार मैक 1 (लगभग 1330 किमी/घंटा) को छू ले, तो सफर जमीन पर नहीं-आवाज़ की गति पर होता है🚀🌍

यह कॉन्सेप्ट दिखाता है कि अगर जापान में ट्रेन सुपरसोनिक स्पीड से दौड़े, तो अनुभव कैसा होगा। फिलहाल सबसे तेज़ ट्रेनों की रफ्तार करीब 320 किमी/घंटा है, और मैग्लेव तकनीक टेस्टिंग में 600+ किमी/घंटा तक पहुँच चुकी है।

लेकिन 1300+ किमी/घंटा पाने के लिए चाहिए उन्नत मैग्लेव सिस्टम, लगभग शून्य घर्षण ट्रैक और लो-प्रेशर टनल-ताकि एयर रेजिस्टेंस कम से कम हो सके।

सोचिए... जो सफर आज घंटों लेता है, वो कुछ ही मिनटों में पूरा हो जाए !

भविष्य की यात्रा यहीं से शुरू होती है क्या आप इस स्पीड का

अनुभव करना चाहेंगे?🚄💭
さらに、建設中の中央新幹線🔮✨中央新幹線🔮✨
完成すれば、東京~大阪間を約1時間で結ぶことになりますで結ぶことになります #факты #знания
#факты #знания #знания Maglev Science Trending

clips_music_attribution_info.song_name: Mix: newsbynhl • Original audio | Aunker • Камин - Sped Up

node.text:
Everyone with an audience should be making content on this. I don’t want to see food bloggers and fashion bloggers acting all perky. 

Yes life goes on, create the content you need to. But stand UP for this. Social media is how information and influence circulates. If you’re a content creator, make the world roar. This is the least you can do.
This is so awful! If we remove the heads of the snakes this ends! They are Trump and Netanyahu!!!
